description: Study identifier in authorYEAR_shortname format
Language of the stimuli (Indonesian)
Experimental paradigm (ERP)
Counterbalancing list assignment (1 = E01–E22; 2 = E23–E45)
Participant code (E01–E45)
Trial number within participant session (1–200)
Unique sentence identifier shared across participants and lists (1–159 for experimental; NA for fillers)
Reconstructed full experimental sentence text; empty for filler trials
Row identifier from original E-Prime output file
Stimulus word presented at this position
Original condition/item code from the E-Prime script
Experimental condition: Active | AB_Passive | PB_Passive | Filler
Named syntactic position of the word: NP1_w1 | NP1_w2 | VERB | ADV | NP2_w1 | NP2_w2 | PP_w1 | PP_w2 | PP_w3 | w0–w9 (filler words)
Sequential word position number within trial (1-indexed for experimental words; 0 for filler probe rows)
Number of characters in the stimulus word
Word onset time in milliseconds as recorded by E-Prime
Whether this word is an ERP critical region of interest (1 = yes; 0 = no). Targets: VERB (position 3), ADV (position 4), NP2_w2 (position 6)
Mean N400 amplitude in microvolts (300–500 ms post-stimulus; centroparietal electrode cluster). NA for non-target words.
Mean P600 amplitude in microvolts (500–800 ms post-stimulus; centroparietal electrode cluster). NA for non-target words.
Peak N400 amplitude in microvolts within the 300–500 ms window. NA for non-target words.
Peak P600 amplitude in microvolts within the 500–800 ms window. NA for non-target words.
Latency of peak N400 amplitude in milliseconds relative to word onset. NA for non-target words.
Latency of peak P600 amplitude in milliseconds relative to word onset. NA for non-target words.
Absolute peak amplitude in microvolts across the full ERP analysis window. NA for non-target words.
